title: Better Jockeys
description: Add improved skeleton jockeys to your world!
body:
![Better Jockeys Logo](https://ewanhowell.com/assets/images/resourcepacks/better-jockeys/logo.webp)
## Add improved skeleton jockeys to your world!
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/better-jockeys)




This pack adds unique skeleton skins for when the skeleton is riding on either the spider or the skeleton horse! Limitations: The skeletons will lose their unique textures if the entity they are riding gets killed and they get reloaded, either through a pack reload, world reload, or chunk reload.
